title: Looking for Category Manager at Shadowfax

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Shadowfax
jsonLd.description:
Shadowfax invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Agra location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shadowfax:
Shadowfax is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shadowfax!
